title: Runway Avatar
description: Represents an avatar persona in the Runway Characters system. Avatars are persistent conversational video agents with defined appearance, voice, and personality, created from a single reference image.

id.description: The unique identifier for the avatar.

name.description: A human-readable name for the avatar persona.

referenceImage.description: The HTTPS URL of the reference image used for the avatar's appearance. Any visual style works, from photorealistic humans to animated mascots.

personality.description: Instructions defining the avatar's personality, behavior, and conversational style.

openingMessage.description: An optional opening message that the avatar speaks when a session starts.

documentIds.description: List of knowledge document IDs attached to the avatar, providing additional context during conversations.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the avatar was created.

VoiceConfig.description: Configuration for the avatar's voice, specifying the voice provider and preset.

presetId.description: The identifier of the voice preset to use for the avatar.

RealtimeSession.description: A live WebRTC session connecting a user to an avatar for real-time conversational interaction. Sessions have a maximum duration of 5 minutes.

id.description: The unique identifier of the session.

status.description: The current status of the session.

model.description: The model type used for the session.

serverUrl.description: The WebRTC server URL to connect to.

token.description: The one-time authentication token for the WebRTC connection.

roomName.description: The name of the WebRTC room to join.

Document.description: A domain-specific knowledge document that avatars can reference during conversations to provide accurate, contextual responses.

id.description: The unique identifier of the document.

name.description: A human-readable name for the knowledge document.

content.description: The text content of the knowledge document. Each avatar supports up to 50,000 tokens of knowledge across all attached documents.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was uploaded.

PresetAvatar.description: Available preset avatar identifiers for quick session creation without custom avatar setup.
